title: XYLimClr Statement
see_also:
Clears the XYLim definition.

XYLim Statement

XYLimDef Function

XYLimClr Statement Example

This example uses the XYLimClr statement in a program:

Function ClearXYLim

		  If XYLimDef = True Then

XYLimClr

EndIf

		Fend
examples:
Function ClearXYLim
		  If XYLimDef = True Then

			    XYLimClr

		  EndIf
		Fend
